III. Policy Implementation 1. The University of Maryland prohibits the use of a person’s SSN as a publicly visible identiﬁcation number for University-related transactions, unless speciﬁcally required by law or business necessity. A listing of currently approved uses is provided in Appendix A. This list is subject to change.
